code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v) v
  when None 0
  end
  mut x = n
  mut sum = 0
  if x == 0
    sum = 0
  end
  while x > 0
    sum = sum + (x % 10)
    x = x / 10
  end
  println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
